title: A01:2021-Broken Access Control
description: Restrictions on what authenticated users are allowed to do are not properly enforced.

questions.text: What is the primary risk of Broken Access Control?

title: A02:2021-Cryptographic Failures
description: Failure to protect sensitive data or using weak encryption algorithms.

questions.text: Which hashing algorithm is considered insecure today?

title: A03:2021-Injection
description: User-supplied data is not validated, filtered, or sanitized by the application.

questions.text: How can you prevent SQL Injection?

title: A04:2021-Insecure Design
description: Risks related to design flaws, with a call for more use of threat modeling and secure design patterns.

title: A05:2021-Security Misconfiguration
description: Insecure default configurations, open cloud storage, or misconfigured HTTP headers.

questions.text: Which of these is a security misconfiguration?
